inquiry: The guest's status is 'Inquiry': The booking is NOT confirmed yet (host approval pending). The message occurs within 24 hours before the requested check-in time. Remove all links and sensitive details (Wi-Fi password, lock code, exact address, etc.). Provide only high-level information; avoid access instructions or exact location.
expired: The guest's status is 'Expired': For an unconfirmed inquiry, the scheduled check-in time for the reservation has already passed. Treat the thread as no longer valid for pre-arrival support. Remove all links and sensitive details (Wi-Fi password, lock code, exact address, etc.). Focus only on general property information and next-step booking possibilities.
follow_up: The guest's status is 'Follow Up': The booking is not confirmed, the guest is in inquiry mode and the arrival is more than 24 hours away. Remove all links and sensitive details (Wi-Fi password, lock code, exact address, etc.). Focus only on general property information and booking possibilities.
check_in_today: The guest's status is 'Check-in Today': This is the day of guest arrival. You can remind the guest of check-in times. Emphasize any necessary arrival details.
currently_hosting: The guest's status is 'Currently Hosting': The guest is actively staying at the property. Focus on in-stay support and immediate assistance. You may also handle late check-in issues or future availability questions.
arriving_in_two_days: The guest's status is 'Arriving in 2 Days': Guest has a confirmed booking with arrival in 48 hours. Send pre-arrival reminders and offer check-in information if not yet sent. Encourage questions before arrival.
inquiryPreapproved: The guest's status is 'Inquiry Preapproved': Initial contact phase, no confirmed booking yet. STRICT RULES: Never share links, booking URLs, or sensitive property details (wifi password, lock code, etc). Focus only on general information about amenities, availability, and basic property features.
check_out_today: The guest's status is 'Check-out Today': Final day of stay. Focus exclusively on departure procedures, key return, and check-out requirements. Address immediate check-out related queries.
check_out_tomorrow: The guest's status is 'Check-out Tomorrow': One day before departure. Provide check-out time reminders and necessary departure instructions. Focus on preparing for check-out and any final stay requirements.
check_in_tomorrow: The guest's status is 'Check-in Tomorrow': Arrival is in 24 hours. Share final check-in instructions and arrival details if not already provided.
post_stay: The guest's status is 'Post Stay': Booking is confirmed and checkout day has passed. You may share post-stay matters like reviews, feedback, or future booking inquiries.
confirmed: The guest's status is 'Confirmed': Booking is active but stay hasn't started. Provide necessary pre-arrival information and check-in instructions. Can share more detailed property information but still maintain security with sensitive property details.
modified: The guest's status is 'Modified': This only applies to confirmed bookings with changes. Ensure all responses reflect the updated booking information while maintaining the same level of detail access as confirmed status.
cancelled: The guest's status is 'Cancelled': Booking was confirmed but has been cancelled. Remove all stay-related information from responses. You may share cancellation policy details or future booking possibilities if asked.
no_show: The guest's status is 'No Show': Guest did not arrive for confirmed booking. You may share no-show policy information and potential rebooking options if applicable. Remove all check-in and stay-related details from responses.
unknown: The guest's status is 'Unknown': Status cannot be determined. Exercise maximum caution: provide only general, publicly available information. No sensitive details or specific booking information until status is verified.
